title: Lead Engineer (Electrical)
description:
• Technical Assistance: Lead User / Client meetings acting as technical lead for Design / Build Team as required. (Irrespective of Mech or Arch or ELE).

o Technically sound in designing for Local & International projects with standards, environmental codes, building codes and safety standards.

o Ability to convey and coordinate complex technical issues to senior managers, Cost Manager, and Procurement Managers.

• Team Development: Lead internal training to the team of Engineers/Architects

o Train for pre-sales engagement and ensure knowledge transfer of design methodology, cost modelling, etc. to employees.

o Plan and arrange regular courses and seminars for the team.

• Knowledge Sharing: Lead in organizing regular inter team briefings and knowledge sharing sessions.

o Conduct Lessons Learnt sessions for each project stage completion.

o (Design – Build – Operate) and share the End-user / DC Operator’s feedback.

• Resource Management: Lead each phase of the project from design to completion and ensure efficient use of resources and enhance cost-effectiveness.

• International Exposure: Lead new business ventures overseas with the proactive approach to understand the country specific needs and standards.

• Procurement Management: Generate Risk analysis report by checking the submitted risk analysis by the team for its consistency between tender and quotation specification.

o Lead the review & manage supplemental material (Spec, DWG) for quotation.

o Review BoQ (Material and quantity)

o Review & Manage Value Engineering and technical review.

o To negotiate with the regulatory agencies for building code and MEP change orders, when required.

• Design Administration: Review design concepts and ensure high standards.

o Confirm design requirement.

o Analyze existing facilities.

o Manage Conceptual sizing/design.

• Lead the preparation of presentation material for tender interview.

• Lead audit and consultancy services.

• Leading or facilitating the design review meetings and design workshops.

• Feasibility study preparation & Lead

• Assessment of mission critical building

• Concept & schematic design

o Summarize design requirement.

o Analyzing existing facility

o Schematic design report

o Design development (Spec., technical calculation sheet)

o Propose new, feasible innovations and stay abreast of the latest trend in the market.

• Detail design

o Lead the drafters for shop drawing preparation.

o Authority submission arrangement with QP

o Input for T&C requirement (prepare test script and ensure that the methodology is in line internally)

o Design Coordination with other discipline.

• Energy Efficiency, CFD & PUE Management

o To Lead Energy simulations to achieve Energy efficiency.

o To Lead Internal CFD from the initial Design stage

o To Lead External CFD and work with the space planner for effective equipment positioning.

o To Lead PUE calculations from the feasibility to the Handover stage.

• Construction Administration: Project Management & Schedule Management with MS Project / Primavera P6

o Lead Project Management for new construction and D&B project in design phase working directly with clients, consultants, statutory authorities, and contractors.

o To Lead review of construction material / shop drawing / MoS

o Shop drawing coordination with sub-con/vendor & other stakeholders.

o Periodical inspection (internal check for quality improvement)

o Ensure site installation works are according to project plans / designs / time frame.

• Testing & Commissioning Administration:

o T&C consultation for FAT, SAT, and IST with Technical & Q&C department

o To Lead in the review and management of End-User requirements and Tagging systems.

• BIM Management: Lead Handover submission arrangement with drafter team and project team (As built BIM Packages)

o Lead the team working in Cloud, Design Collaboration and Model coordination and QA/QC own work.

o AutoCAD & Revit management experience with Cloud Work-sharing (ACC).

o Lead the Construction handover is in accordance with the project’s BEP (BIM Execution Plan).

• Depending on project need, this position may be located On-Site or Off-Site and requires frequent travel to the project site.

• Any other duties assigned by Manager / Assistant Manager / Senior Manager.
